results.title: 'Bandar' trailer: Bobby turns fallen pop star in Anurag's dark thriller
results.description: Anurag Kashyap's 'Bandar' trailer unveils Bobby Deol as a crumbling rockstar facing sexual assault allegations. The gritty preview showcases his downfall from fame to legal battles, with Sanya Malhotra portraying his conflicted sister. The film, co-written by Sudip Sharma and Abhishek Banerjee, has sparked intense online debate about its themes, promising a compelling narrative for its June 5, 2026 release.

results.title: Madhuri Dixit Fought Fever While 4-Month Pregnant During Dola Re Shoot
results.description: The untold story behind Dola Re Dola: Madhuri Dixit battled fever and dizziness while four months pregnant, shooting 13 hours without asking Saroj Khan to change a step.

results.title: SSC GD Mock Test
results.description: SSC GD 2024 Mock Tests for SSC GD mock exams are available. Attempt SSC GD Free Mock Test and prepare online for SSC GD 2024.
